text:
It seems fate beckons you to
a new journey.
text_joined:
It seems fate beckons you to
a new journey.

text:
Ever shall I treasure the days that we
spent together. It has been an honor
to call you my companion.
text_joined:
Ever shall I treasure the days that we
spent together. It has been an honor
to call you my companion.

text:
My descendants shall know the tales of
our adventures, as well as those of the
sacred treasures, for generations to come.
text_joined:
My descendants shall know the tales of
our adventures, as well as those of the
sacred treasures, for generations to come.

text:
May your travels be filled with wondrous
delights, and may fate deign to reunite
us one blessed day.
text_joined:
May your travels be filled with wondrous
delights, and may fate deign to reunite
us one blessed day.

text:
You are the only one to have ever
bested me.
text_joined:

bested me.

text:
You taught me that I still have much
to learn.

You taught me that I still have much
to learn.

text:
You will continue to grow in your
travels, as I will in mine.
text_joined:
You will continue to grow in your
travels, as I will in mine.

text_joined: I eagerly await the day we meet again.

text:
So you're leavin', huh? Make sure to
steer clear of trouble, all right?
text_joined:
So you're leavin', huh? Make sure to
steer clear of trouble, all right?

text: I'm gonna stick around here for a while.
text_joined: I'm gonna stick around here for a while.

the town by the time you get back.

I promise ya, you'll barely recognize
the town by the time you get back.

special on your travels, let me know
and I'll come runnin'!
text_joined:

text:

This town's gonna be all right.

All your hard work's really paid off!

home to, isn't it? Really gives you
peace of mind.

miss my own hometown.

Maybe it's time for a visit.

Is it 'cause you destroyed that ring?

its burden.

medicines—items for all manner of

to you!

surrounded, right, Ludo?
text_joined:
You know they've got you

cut 'em down before they eat me,
will ya!?
text_joined:

text:
I'm fine. I may not look it, but I've
seen my share of battles. I can take
care of myself.
text_joined:
I'm fine. I may not look it, but I've

text:

Well, with those skills...I'm sure

text:

I <i>mean</> I'm gonna do business

text:

I can't believe it!
text_joined:

Just to be clear, I've had my eye

text:

What? You should have

I needed to see what kind of
people ya were.
text_joined:
I hadn't made my decision yet.

people ya were.

Business is built on relationships,
and I didn't wanna build one
with people I couldn't trust.
text_joined:
Business is built on relationships,

text:
So I guess this means we
managed to impress you.
text_joined:

text:

with ya, <chara_name>.

together, lemme give ya a tip.

text: "Don't dwell on trivial things."

text: It's nice to meet you, Ludo!

this town and travel the continent.

text:
I know you have your hands full with
the rings right now, and that it isn't
the journey you were hoping for.
text_joined:
I know you have your hands full with
the rings right now, and that it isn't
the journey you were hoping for.

text:
But I hope that when you get ready
to set out on the journey you always
wanted...
text_joined:
But I hope that when you get ready
to set out on the journey you always
wanted...

text:
We'll be standing here, in a Wishvale
that's bigger and better than ever...
text_joined:
We'll be standing here, in a Wishvale
that's bigger and better than ever...

text:
And I'll be able to say, "Take care
out there."
text_joined:
And I'll be able to say, "Take care
out there."

text:
So until that day comes, let's work
together to make this town the best
there is!
text_joined:
So until that day comes, let's work
together to make this town the best
there is!

text:
I can't wait to see the monsters in
action. Everyone's looking forward
to it!
text_joined:
I can't wait to see the monsters in
action. Everyone's looking forward
to it!

text:
Why not take a turn in the ring
yourself? I heard you used to be
a member of the watch.
text_joined:
Why not take a turn in the ring
yourself? I heard you used to be
a member of the watch.

text:
Haha, I don't think I'm cut out for it.
I'll leave that to <chara_name>.
That was some impressive fighting.
text_joined:
Haha, I don't think I'm cut out for it.
I'll leave that to <chara_name>.
That was some impressive fighting.

text: Fried would be so proud.
text_joined: Fried would be so proud.

text:
Hey, what's that instrument called?
I wanna play it, too!
text_joined:
Hey, what's that instrument called?
I wanna play it, too!

text:
It's not often you admit you don't
know something! I'll ask about it
later.
text_joined:
It's not often you admit you don't
know something! I'll ask about it
later.

text: F-forget it! I can ask myself!
text_joined: F-forget it! I can ask myself!

text: Lutus... Are you crying?
text_joined: Lutus... Are you crying?

text: N-no! This isn't what you think!
text_joined: N-no! This isn't what you think!

text:
It's just...that song reminded me of
Nellum for some reason. That's all.
text_joined:
It's just...that song reminded me of
Nellum for some reason. That's all.

text: It was beautiful, wasn't it?
text_joined: It was beautiful, wasn't it?

text:
It's nice to see how excited everyone
is about the new buildings.
text_joined:
It's nice to see how excited everyone
is about the new buildings.

text: Anyway, we're finally at the last step!
text_joined: Anyway, we're finally at the last step!

text:
We just need to clear this grove to
make room for more people!
text_joined:
We just need to clear this grove to
make room for more people!

text: We've waited so long for this.
text_joined: We've waited so long for this.

text:
Wishvale's even bigger now than
it was before.
text_joined:
Wishvale's even bigger now than
it was before.

text:
Do you think our dads would be
proud?
text_joined:
Do you think our dads would be
proud?

text:
You're keeping the town safe
in place of Fried...
text_joined:
You're keeping the town safe
in place of Fried...

text: And I'm following in Pops's footsteps.
text_joined: And I'm following in Pops's footsteps.

text:
Hey, <chara_name>?
What should we do with the town
now?
text_joined:
Hey, <chara_name>?
What should we do with the town
now?

text: What will you say?
text_joined: What will you say?

text: Let's keep expanding.
text_joined: Let's keep expanding.

text: Invite more people.
text_joined: Invite more people.

text: I don't know.
text_joined: I don't know.

text:
Sounds like you two are having fun
over here!
text_joined:
Sounds like you two are having fun
over here!

text:
But it's our town too, you know!
I think we should have a say.
text_joined:
But it's our town too, you know!
I think we should have a say.

text:
Yes, let us discuss things together
to keep improving the town.
text_joined:
Yes, let us discuss things together
to keep improving the town.

text:
I know I wasn't born here, but...
we're all family now, ain't we?
text_joined:
I know I wasn't born here, but...
we're all family now, ain't we?

text: Yeah... You're absolutely right.
text_joined: Yeah... You're absolutely right.

text:
"For the future of Wishvale"...
That's what it's all about, right?
text_joined:
"For the future of Wishvale"...
That's what it's all about, right?

text:
We should take everyone's hopes
and dreams for this place...
text_joined:
We should take everyone's hopes
and dreams for this place...

text: ...and turn them into reality!
text_joined: ...and turn them into reality!

text: Yeah!
text_joined: Yeah!

text:
Hey, <chara_name>...
Do you remember when I said I wanted
to leave this town?
text_joined:
Hey, <chara_name>...
Do you remember when I said I wanted
to leave this town?

text:
Well, my wish came true. Maybe not
in the way I wished for, but I still got
to travel with you.
text_joined:
Well, my wish came true. Maybe not
in the way I wished for, but I still got
to travel with you.

text:
So now my dream is...to make this
the best town on the continent!
text_joined:
So now my dream is...to make this
the best town on the continent!

text: That's great, Stia!
text_joined: That's great, Stia!

text:
I'm sure Lavore would be delighted
to hear that!
text_joined:
I'm sure Lavore would be delighted
to hear that!

text: Hehe... I hope so.
text_joined: Hehe... I hope so.

text:
Let's all work together to make
this town one where everyone's
smiling and happy!
text_joined:
Let's all work together to make
this town one where everyone's
smiling and happy!

text:
Because that's the way our Wishvale
should be!
text_joined:
Because that's the way our Wishvale
should be!

text:
Hey, Phenn... Are you ever going to
get more employees for this place?
text_joined:
Hey, Phenn... Are you ever going to
get more employees for this place?

text:
I wish I could, but I'm not sure
how to go about doing it.
text_joined:
I wish I could, but I'm not sure
how to go about doing it.

text:
Heh heh, that's where this comes in:
a radiant cornerstone!
text_joined:
Heh heh, that's where this comes in:
a radiant cornerstone!

text:
I got one from my pops way back
when. It's a special material that
only strong monsters have.
text_joined:
I got one from my pops way back
when. It's a special material that
only strong monsters have.

text:
Whoa, that's great! Once this place
gets bigger, we'll have all the liquor
we can drink!
text_joined:
Whoa, that's great! Once this place
gets bigger, we'll have all the liquor
we can drink!

text:
But even that won't be enough
for you...
text_joined:
But even that won't be enough
for you...

text:
Here you are, <chara_name>.
Try using this radiant cornerstone
on the hub.
text_joined:
Here you are, <chara_name>.
Try using this radiant cornerstone
on the hub.

text:
What's the matter, Lutus?
You seem down.
text_joined:
What's the matter, Lutus?
You seem down.

text: I was just thinking...
text_joined: I was just thinking...

text:
The town's restoration, what
happened with Edoras... It's all
thanks to you.
text_joined:
The town's restoration, what
happened with Edoras... It's all
thanks to you.

text:
Well, we had a lot of help from
others, too.
text_joined:
Well, we had a lot of help from
others, too.

text:
I just wish there was some way I could
pitch in along with everyone else, but...
text_joined:
I just wish there was some way I could
pitch in along with everyone else, but...

text: I know! How's this for an idea?
text_joined: I know! How's this for an idea?

text:
A carpenter from Cragspear was
telling me about the buildings there.
text_joined:
A carpenter from Cragspear was
telling me about the buildings there.

text:
I bet you could make ones that
look just like those.
text_joined:
I bet you could make ones that
look just like those.

text:
Yeah, we could try incorporating
the aesthetics of the places we've
seen on our journey.
text_joined:
Yeah, we could try incorporating
the aesthetics of the places we've
seen on our journey.

text: That's a great idea! Thanks, Lutus!
text_joined: That's a great idea! Thanks, Lutus!

text: Haha, glad I could be of service.
text_joined: Haha, glad I could be of service.

text:
Okay, break time's over! I should
get back to chopping wood.
text_joined:
Okay, break time's over! I should
get back to chopping wood.

text:
All right! Time to start something
new!
text_joined:
All right! Time to start something
new!

text: But...what should we build next?
text_joined: But...what should we build next?

text:
How about someplace the children
can play?
text_joined:
How about someplace the children
can play?

text: A place to play, huh...?
text_joined: A place to play, huh...?

text:
Not just to play! It has to be a place
where we can learn things, too!
text_joined:
Not just to play! It has to be a place
where we can learn things, too!

text:
That's my girl! I'm certain you'll
grow up to be a scholar—no,
an academy professor!
text_joined:
That's my girl! I'm certain you'll
grow up to be a scholar—no,
an academy professor!

text:
In that case, how about a museum?
Someplace both kids and adults
can enjoy!
text_joined:
In that case, how about a museum?
Someplace both kids and adults
can enjoy!

text: You better make it good!
text_joined: You better make it good!

text: Heh heh, just leave it to me!
text_joined: Heh heh, just leave it to me!

text: Wow, this place is huge!
text_joined: Wow, this place is huge!

text:
With a stage like that, I bet
we could have dance recitals!
text_joined:
With a stage like that, I bet
we could have dance recitals!

text:
Look at that, even my wife is as giddy
as a schoolgirl. I can't thank you
enough.
text_joined:
Look at that, even my wife is as giddy
as a schoolgirl. I can't thank you
enough.

text: I'm just glad to see they like it!
text_joined: I'm just glad to see they like it!

text:
I don't think you can really call it
a proper museum yet, though.
text_joined:
I don't think you can really call it
a proper museum yet, though.

text:
In time, I'll add a library and some
other things.
text_joined:
In time, I'll add a library and some
other things.

text: Please do. Lila would be so delighted.
text_joined: Please do. Lila would be so delighted.

text: By the way...
text_joined: By the way...

text: Who is that?
text_joined: Who is that?

text: Are you referring to me?
text_joined: Are you referring to me?

text: I'm a traveling composer.
text_joined: I'm a traveling composer.

text:
The scent of artistic discovery
led me here.
text_joined:
The scent of artistic discovery
led me here.

text:
This place has such wonderfully
fresh air... I think it will be a perfect
place for me to perform.
text_joined:
This place has such wonderfully
fresh air... I think it will be a perfect
place for me to perform.

text:
In fact, it's already inspired me to
compose a song! Here, take this
sheet music.
text_joined:
In fact, it's already inspired me to
compose a song! Here, take this
sheet music.

text:
And if you find any others, bring them
to me and I will fill the town with song.
text_joined:
And if you find any others, bring them
to me and I will fill the town with song.

text: That's incredible! We'd love that!
text_joined: That's incredible! We'd love that!

text:
Let's fill Wishvale with all kinds
of music!
text_joined:
Let's fill Wishvale with all kinds
of music!

text: Thank you! Oh, thank you!
text_joined: Thank you! Oh, thank you!

text:
The sheer terror of the Sultravi and
your utter mastery in overcoming it...!
text_joined:
The sheer terror of the Sultravi and
your utter mastery in overcoming it...!

text:
It was like witnessing a mythic battle
in real life! I have no words!
text_joined:
It was like witnessing a mythic battle
in real life! I have no words!

text:
*sigh* I'm so pleased, I could die at
this very moment without regret.
text_joined:
*sigh* I'm so pleased, I could die at
this very moment without regret.

text:
Wait, what am I saying? I can't die yet!
I don't want to miss any of your future
bouts!
text_joined:
Wait, what am I saying? I can't die yet!
I don't want to miss any of your future

text:
I hope you'll continue to impress us
with your prowess here at the monster
arena.
text_joined:
I hope you'll continue to impress us
with your prowess here at the monster
arena.

text: Oh, and please take this.
text_joined: Oh, and please take this.

text:
Think of it as a sign of appreciation
from me and all of your adoring fans.
text_joined:
Think of it as a sign of appreciation
from me and all of your adoring fans.

text: Could that heavenly jewel be...?
text_joined: Could that heavenly jewel be...?

text: May I see that for a meowment?
text_joined: May I see that for a meowment?

text: Yes! I mew it!
text_joined: Yes! I mew it!

text: Mrooow! What's this!?
text_joined: Mrooow! What's this!?

text:
I think I hear excited voices from
within...
text_joined:
I think I hear excited voices from
within...

text:
Hey, Ludo... We got all this stuff,
but is any of it useful?
text_joined:
Hey, Ludo... We got all this stuff,
but is any of it useful?

text:
Oh, I see you've got a list of
trade goods!
text_joined:
Oh, I see you've got a list of
trade goods!

text:
This'll allow us to get trade goods
from other towns.

This'll allow us to get trade goods

The stuff that's available changes
periodically, and some of it can be
pretty rare.
text_joined:
The stuff that's available changes
periodically, and some of it can be

If ya want, I can set stuff aside for ya.
So take a look whenever ya come
back to town.

If ya want, I can set stuff aside for ya.

text:
Got it. Then if we find any more,
we'll make sure to bring them here!
text_joined:
Got it. Then if we find any more,
we'll make sure to bring them here!

text: Also...
text_joined: Also...

text:
If ya get another town's equipment
archive info, I can start stocking
their equipment here.
text_joined:
If ya get another town's equipment
archive info, I can start stocking
their equipment here.

text:
That way ya won't have to go travelin'
from town to town just to buy things.
text_joined:
That way ya won't have to go travelin'
from town to town just to buy things.

text:
So keep an eye out for both those
things as you go. Help me make
this shop more convenient!
text_joined:
So keep an eye out for both those
things as you go. Help me make
this shop more convenient!

text: Oh...
text_joined: Oh...

text: Ooooooh!
text_joined: Ooooooh!

text:
What a thrilling sight! Their glory
is absolutely overwhelming!
text_joined:
What a thrilling sight! Their glory
is absolutely overwhelming!

text: At long last...I can compose it!
text_joined: At long last...I can compose it!

text: The greatest song ever written!
text_joined: The greatest song ever written!

text: I've done it.
text_joined: I've done it.

text:
Please, you must have this.
It's my greatest composition!
text_joined:
Please, you must have this.
It's my greatest composition!

text: Mm... *snore*
text_joined: Mm... *snore*

text: Why hello there, <chara_name>!
text_joined: Why hello there, <chara_name>!

text:
You look to be in good spirits.
Indeed, it's as if you've accomplished
some amazing feat.
text_joined:
You look to be in good spirits.
Indeed, it's as if you've accomplished
some amazing feat.

text:
Would you mind elucidating me
on the events of your travels?
text_joined:
Would you mind elucidating me
on the events of your travels?

text: My word! What an astonishing tale!
text_joined: My word! What an astonishing tale!

text:
So astonishing, in fact, that I
composed an entire song while
I was listening.
text_joined:
So astonishing, in fact, that I
composed an entire song while
I was listening.

text:
I dedicate this score to you and
your incredible journey.
text_joined:
I dedicate this score to you and
your incredible journey.

text: Welcome, traveler, to the Tavern of Nil.
text_joined: Welcome, traveler, to the Tavern of Nil.

text: In this forgotten corner of Orsterra,
text_joined: In this forgotten corner of Orsterra,

text: the architects of creation gather and make merry.
text_joined: the architects of creation gather and make merry.

text: Though not a lavish gathering,
text_joined: Though not a lavish gathering,

text: you are free to whittle away the hours in their company,
text_joined: you are free to whittle away the hours in their company,

text: and partake of their wisdom and knowledge.
text_joined: and partake of their wisdom and knowledge.

text: Before we get started,
text_joined: Before we get started,

text: this rubble needs to go.
text_joined: this rubble needs to go.

text:
We'll need to clear plenty of space
for the workshop.
text_joined:
We'll need to clear plenty of space
for the workshop.

text:
Would you mind helping me out,
<chara_name>?
text_joined:
Would you mind helping me out,
<chara_name>?

text:
Thanks, <chara_name>!
This should do it.
text_joined:
Thanks, <chara_name>!
This should do it.

text: Now for the materials...
text_joined: Now for the materials...

text:
The rubble provided us with plenty
of stone, but we don't have any
lumber.
text_joined:
The rubble provided us with plenty
of stone, but we don't have any
lumber.

text:
Would you mind going out and
gathering some lumber from
Wishvale Trail?
text_joined:
Would you mind going out and
gathering some lumber from
Wishvale Trail?

text: Thanks! This should be plenty.
text_joined: Thanks! This should be plenty.

text:
Yeah, I can do this... Pops taught
me all about building a strong
foundation.
text_joined:
Yeah, I can do this... Pops taught
me all about building a strong
foundation.

text: Now let's build a workshop!
text_joined: Now let's build a workshop!

text:
I have to believe that there are other
survivors out there somewhere.
text_joined:
I have to believe that there are other
survivors out there somewhere.

text:
And if they heard we're rebuilding
Wishvale, maybe they'll want to come
back and help.
text_joined:
And if they heard we're rebuilding
Wishvale, maybe they'll want to come
back and help.

text:
Hey, <chara_name>...
Maybe we should look for them.
text_joined:
Hey, <chara_name>...
Maybe we should look for them.

text:
When traveling through the North
Theatropolis Plains, I remember
seeing an old shack.
text_joined:
When traveling through the North
Theatropolis Plains, I remember
seeing an old shack.

text:
I got the feeling someone was living
there, and I couldn't help but wonder...
text_joined:
I got the feeling someone was living
there, and I couldn't help but wonder...

text:
It's the first place you pass after
leaving the Wishvale Trail.
text_joined:
It's the first place you pass after
leaving the Wishvale Trail.

text:
Whoever's there might know
something. Let's go and take a look.
text_joined:
Whoever's there might know
something. Let's go and take a look.

text: Hello! Is anyone home?
text_joined: Hello! Is anyone home?

text: I'm here, I'm here... *hic*
text_joined: I'm here, I'm here... *hic*

text: Tyme...?
text_joined: Tyme...?

text: Huh?
text_joined: Huh?

text:
Must be drinking too much...
I'm seeing the ghosts of Wishvale's
little ones...
text_joined:
Must be drinking too much...
I'm seeing the ghosts of Wishvale's
little ones...

text:
We're not ghosts! It's Stia and
<chara_name>!
text_joined:
We're not ghosts! It's Stia and
<chara_name>!

text: Gods, can it be!?
text_joined: Gods, can it be!?

text:
You're alive...and you're so much
bigger than I remember...
text_joined:
You're alive...and you're so much
bigger than I remember...

text:
We're glad to see you again too,
Tyme...
text_joined:
We're glad to see you again too,
Tyme...

text:
That night...I barely managed to
get away. Found this abandoned
shack and hid till the danger passed.
text_joined:
That night...I barely managed to
get away. Found this abandoned
shack and hid till the danger passed.

text: But you two—how have you been?
text_joined: But you two—how have you been?

text:
Actually, we're working on rebuilding
Wishvale!
text_joined:
Actually, we're working on rebuilding
Wishvale!

text: You're doing what!?
text_joined: You're doing what!?

text:
My father may be gone, but I want
to carry on his legacy and restore the
village to what it was!
text_joined:
My father may be gone, but I want
to carry on his legacy and restore the
village to what it was!

text:
Though so far, we've only built
a workshop...
text_joined:
Though so far, we've only built
a workshop...

text:
That's amazing, Stia. Lavore would be
so proud of you.
text_joined:
That's amazing, Stia. Lavore would be
so proud of you.

text:
And <chara_name>.
What about your folks...?
text_joined:
And <chara_name>.
What about your folks...?

text:
I'm sorry to hear that... So it really is
just the two of you then...
text_joined:
I'm sorry to hear that... So it really is
just the two of you then...

text:
Incredible. You're working so hard,
and I'm here drinking my life away...
text_joined:
Incredible. You're working so hard,
and I'm here drinking my life away...

text: Tyme, won't you return to Wishvale?
text_joined: Tyme, won't you return to Wishvale?

text: You can help us rebuild the village.
text_joined: You can help us rebuild the village.

text: But even if I did, what use would I be?
text_joined: But even if I did, what use would I be?

text:
What do you think we should do,
<chara_name>?
text_joined:
What do you think we should do,
<chara_name>?

text: Is this...is this really Wishvale...?
text_joined: Is this...is this really Wishvale...?

text: It breaks my heart to see it like this...
text_joined: It breaks my heart to see it like this...

text:
It'll only get better from here!
We're going to make it a bustling
town like it used to be!
text_joined:
It'll only get better from here!
We're going to make it a bustling
town like it used to be!

text:
But first, Tyme's going to need
a place to stay.
text_joined:
But first, Tyme's going to need
a place to stay.

text:
Just like with the workshop, let's
clean up the debris and build
a new house!
text_joined:
Just like with the workshop, let's
clean up the debris and build
a new house!

text:
Oho, what a marvelous job you've
done! It's more than a match for
Lavore's work!
text_joined:
Oho, what a marvelous job you've
done! It's more than a match for

text:
Thanks, Tyme. But you're much
too kind.
text_joined:
Thanks, Tyme. But you're much

text:
Not at all. Your craftsmanship exudes
the same warmth as your father's
houses.

Not at all. Your craftsmanship exudes
the same warmth as your father's
houses.

text: It bespeaks your love for Wishvale.
text_joined: It bespeaks your love for Wishvale.

text:
You can't imagine how happy that
makes me...

You can't imagine how happy that
makes me...

text:
I have the utmost faith that the two
of you have what it takes to rebuild
our village.
text_joined:
I have the utmost faith that the two
of you have what it takes to rebuild
our village.

text: So, let me do what I can to assist you!

text: Thank you so much!

text:
But before we roll up our sleeves,

Why can't I just have her fixed and

Repairs for my beloved vessel would

To what end? You're no sailor,

fits you, Reime.
text_joined:
But something about it really
fits you, Reime.

text:
It's a song from her homeland,
after all.
text_joined:
It's a song from her homeland,
after all.

text:
What kind of songs do you like,
Phenn?
text_joined:
What kind of songs do you like,
Phenn?

text: I guess I like lullabies.
text_joined: I guess I like lullabies.

text: Yusia used to sing them all the time...
text_joined: Yusia used to sing them all the time...

text:
...when she'd tuck me, Stia, and
<chara_name> into bed.
text_joined:
...when she'd tuck me, Stia, and
<chara_name> into bed.

text: Could you sing one for us?
text_joined: Could you sing one for us?

text:
In front of the Songbird of Succor?
No way!
text_joined:
In front of the Songbird of Succor?
No way!

text: Singing is all about heart.
text_joined: Singing is all about heart.

text:
I'd like to hear what a Wishvale
lullaby sounds like myself.
text_joined:
I'd like to hear what a Wishvale
lullaby sounds like myself.

text: Fine, but...you better not laugh.
text_joined: Fine, but...you better not laugh.

text:
"Close your eyes, say goodnight.
Go to sleep in the blue flame's light."
text_joined:
"Close your eyes, say goodnight.
Go to sleep in the blue flame's light."

text:
"Even if you can't see me,
at your side I'll always be."
text_joined:
"Even if you can't see me,
at your side I'll always be."

text:
"To see you smile makes life
worthwhile."
text_joined:
"To see you smile makes life
worthwhile."

text:
"And when the morning birds sing,
let's see what tomorrow will bring."
text_joined:
"And when the morning birds sing,
let's see what tomorrow will bring."

text:
That was beautiful. I could
feel the warmth in every note...
text_joined:
That was beautiful. I could
feel the warmth in every note...

text:
Yes. It was very simple, but I think
that's what makes it so touching.
text_joined:
Yes. It was very simple, but I think
that's what makes it so touching.

text:
Singing it again now made
me realize something...
text_joined:
Singing it again now made
me realize something...

text:
Wishvale was—and is—always
looking to the future.
text_joined:
Wishvale was—and is—always
looking to the future.

text: "For the future of Wishvale," right?
text_joined: "For the future of Wishvale," right?

text: Hey, you stole my line!
text_joined: Hey, you stole my line!

text: A loud rumbling echoes from afar...
text_joined: A loud rumbling echoes from afar...

text: The rumbling grows louder...
text_joined: The rumbling grows louder...

text: You sacrificed your ring to save him...
text_joined: You sacrificed your ring to save him...

text:
Your heart is indeed a beautiful thing
to behold.
text_joined:
Your heart is indeed a beautiful thing
to behold.

text: Without the blessing of the gods,
text_joined: Without the blessing of the gods,

text:
defeating the dark god will not
be easy.
text_joined:
defeating the dark god will not
be easy.

text: Receive of me this.
text_joined: Receive of me this.

text: Chosen One.
text_joined: Chosen One.

text:
The outcome of this ancient struggle
will be decided by your hand.
text_joined:
The outcome of this ancient struggle
will be decided by your hand.

text:
Allow me to grant you my power
once more.
text_joined:
Allow me to grant you my power
once more.

text: With that power...
text_joined: With that power...

text: Lay our brother to rest.
text_joined: Lay our brother to rest.

text:
<chara_name>'s ultimate technique
can now be used again.
text_joined:
<chara_name>'s ultimate technique
can now be used again.

text: I am Amatsukami no Orochi.
text_joined: I am Amatsukami no Orochi.

text: Father of all dragons...
text_joined: Father of all dragons...

text: I seek only those who are worthy.
text_joined: I seek only those who are worthy.

text: Chosen One.
text_joined: Chosen One.

text: I bid you show me your strength...
text_joined: I bid you show me your strength...

text:
Show me...what you are truly
capable of.
text_joined:
Show me...what you are truly
capable of.

text:
Heh heh... How long has it been since
I had such fun?
text_joined:
Heh heh... How long has it been since
I had such fun?

text: Ahaha! Yes, I had longed for this!
text_joined: Ahaha! Yes, I had longed for this!

text:
Very well. I acknowledge your strength.
Now, allow me to show you mine!
text_joined:
Very well. I acknowledge your strength.
Now, allow me to show you mine!

text: Remarkable...
text_joined: Remarkable...

text: You are truly worthy of this.
text_joined: You are truly worthy of this.

text: Reconsider
text_joined: Reconsider
